did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper uses AI (specifically a multimodal deep learning algorithm named MUS-YOLO based on YOLO) to diagnose pediatric vascular diseases (Infantile Hemangiomas and Venous Malformations) using ultrasound images. These conditions are vascular anomalies, not dermatological or skin-cancer conditions. Therefore, the AI application is in the domain of vascular medicine/ultrasound imaging, not dermatology.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
